findings.title: Validation debug logging may expose sensitive tradeline details
findings.description: Validation debug logs include creditor_name and full error/warning messages; these messages can contain account numbers or other PII from the tradeline payload.
findings.snippet:
logger.debug(
    f"Validation result for {tradeline.get('creditor_name', 'unknown')} | "
    f"confidence={confidence:.2f}, severity={severity}, errors={errors}, warnings={warnings}"
)
findings.recommendation: Redact or hash PII in log output, or downgrade to structured metrics without raw field values.
findings.impact: Potential degradation of reliability or security posture if left unaddressed.
